{{Quote|We'll try this Rebellion. But if this Empire isn't overthrown in…five years, tops, we're going back to cards, curves and Corellian brandy…and doing it my way!|Raal Yorta to [[Sammie Staable]]|<ref name="Rookies: Rendezvous">''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
'''Raal Yorta''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]] player and who worked the with [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Sammie Staable]] and the pickpocket [[Smileredon-Verdont]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Oh blast it! Oh blast it! Oh blast it! Oh blast -|A panic-stricken Raal Yorta shooting at [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]|<ref name="Rookies: No Turning Back">''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]''</ref>}}
Raal Yorta was a gambler who enjoyed an extravagant and glamorous lifestyle which meant he was often unable to make ends meet. His father was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Yorta]],<ref name="Rendezvous" /> a major executive of [[Red Star Shipping Lines]].<ref name="TCSWE-RSSL">{{CSWECite|III|88|Red Star Shipping Lines}}</ref> Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Raal Yorta became an associate of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Sammie Staable]] and the pickpocket [[Smileredon-Verdont]]. Like his partners, Raal relied on gambling and scamming small-time criminals in order to capture them for their bounties in order to earn a living.<ref name="Rendezvous" /> Prior to the Battle of Yavin, Raal Yorta, Smileredon-Verdont and Sammie Staable attempted a heist on the ''Coral Vanda''.<ref name="TCSWE-CoralVanda">{{CSWECite|I|140|''Coral Vanda''}}</ref>

With the help of Sammie, Yorta was able to capture the notorious [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] criminal [[Ten-Suckers Madoom]] during a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. Unfortunately for the trio, Sammie had failed to renew his [[B23-1-14 permit]], and received only a paltry 245 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the bounty. At that point, Sammie revealed his intentions to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Rendezvous" />

Drunk, Raal attempted to talk Sammie out of it in an Ord Mantell bar called the [[Power Dive]]. Sammie would not be deterred, however, and pulled a blaster on Raal, taking the gambler hostage aboard his own ship.<ref name="Rendezvous" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Raal Yorta was based on a character roleplayed by [[Parris]] in the "Rebel Breakout" adventure of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']], in which [[Pablo Hidalgo]] was serving as the game master. At least two statements made by Yorta in ''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]'' were adapted from dialogue assigned to "3rd Rebel" and "4th Rebel" in the Adventure Script included with "Rebel Breakout."
